Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.WalletMinCash_t: The minimum amount of money found in a wallet (if not empty).
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.WalletMaxCash_t: The maximum amount of money found in a normal wallet. Jackpots can exceed this.
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.WalletEmptyChan: Percentage chance a wallet contains nothing but junk.
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.WalletJackpotCh: Chance to hit the 'Tax Return' tier, granting max cash + bonus.
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.ScratchTicketWi: Chance that a randomized scratch ticket becomes a winner when scratched.
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.ScratchTicketJa: Extra chance for a winning ticket to jump to the live jackpot pool instead of a normal payout.
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.ScratchTicketMi: Minimum payout for a winning scratch ticket.
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.ScratchTicketMa: Maximum payout for a winning scratch ticket.
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.ScratchTicketLo: Relative weight for low-tier common wins after a ticket wins.
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.ScratchTicketMe: Relative weight for medium-tier common wins after a ticket wins.
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.ScratchTicketHi: Relative weight for high-tier common wins after a ticket wins.
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.ScratchTicketLo: Upper payout ceiling for low common wins as a percent of the configured max win.
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.ScratchTicketMe: Upper payout ceiling for medium common wins as a percent of the configured max win.
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.ScratchTicketHi: Upper payout ceiling for high common wins. Anything above this is reserved for jackpot payouts.
Sandbox_CurrencyExpanded.ScratchTicketJa: Multiplier applied to max win to build the base live jackpot before the rolling pool is added.
Scratch Ticket: Jackpot Growth Per Scratch
How much the live jackpot grows after each non-jackpot scratch.
